title: thelypteris refracta
intro: Thelypteris refracta, also known as the Refracted Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris refracta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the fronds of the plant can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
